product.title: Il Makiage Woke Up Like This Flawless Liquid Foundation, Full Coverage, Matte Finish, 30 ml, Shade 035
featureBullets: Full Coverage: Effortlessly conceals blemishes, redness, and uneven skin tone, providing a flawless, airbrush-like finish. Perfect for achieving a flawless look every day or for special occasions.
Natural Matte Finish: Offers a smooth, matte finish that looks natural and flawless under any lighting. Ideal for those who prefer a shine-free, polished look.
Lightweight Formula: This foundation feels weightless on the skin, allowing it to breathe while providing full coverage. Comfortable for all-day wear without feeling heavy or cakey.
Long-Lasting Wear: Designed to stay intact throughout the day, resisting sweat and humidity. Perfect for long days at work, special events, or nights out.
Wide Range of Shades: Available in various shades to match every skin tone, ensuring an exact match for a natural look. From light to deep, there's a perfect shade for everyone.
Easy Application: Can be seamlessly applied with a brush, sponge, or fingertips. Its blendable formula ensures an even, streak-free application every time.
product.description: Il Makiage Liquid Foundation "Woke Up Like This" Shade 035, 30 ml: Achieve a flawless complexion with Il Makiage's "Woke Up Like This" Liquid Foundation. This versatile foundation offers full coverage and a natural matte finish, effectively concealing imperfections and evening out skin tone. Its lightweight formula ensures comfortable, long-lasting wear, suitable for all skin types. Perfect for daily use, special occasions, and professional settings, this foundation provides a smooth, photo-ready look that enhances your natural beauty.

specification.value: #37,214 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #331 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the foundation provides perfect coverage and is easy to apply, with a smooth application that doesn't feel heavy on the face. The quality is praised as the best they've owned, and the color match receives mixed feedback - while some say it's a perfect match, others find it darker than expected. The skin coverage and texture also get mixed reviews, with some saying it softens wrinkles while others note it doesn't hide them, and opinions vary on whether it's worth the price.

reviews.reviewTitle: Perfect Match With My Skin Tone, Light Weight
reviews.reviewText: Love this make-up. I have very fair skin with a yellow undertone. I use a brush to apply my make-up and it’s so easy to apply. Using a very small amount I got full coverage that lasted all day long. I was surprised at the perfect match for my skin and the yellow undertone disappeared. It blended very well with my blush and lip color. I think is a great value compared to the other make-up I have purchased. It lasted into the evening and I only had to touch up my lip color.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 9, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Great product. I love that the color matched so perfectly and the price on Amazon is great. It offers great full coverage eith very little product.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 25, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Ads for this makeup kept popping up in my social media feeds. I finally decided to give it a try. I almost felt like I was just overwhelmed by the hype of the constant social media ads. It's a little more expensive than brands I normally buy, so I was pretty nervous. This is really nice makeup! I am 66 years old and some other foundations I've tried settle into creases and wrinkles. I This makeup goes on smoothly and seems to skim over those creases and wrinkles. The brand has so many shades to choose from. The one that I selected was perfect. I will definitely be purchasing this product again. I also plan to try other products from tis brand.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on June 7, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Good coverage and doesn’t feel heavy on the skin. I have sensitive skin and it works well for me.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 22, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I returned this after applying foundation to my face. I took the quiz for the correct match. Do not get caught up in the hype or ads regarding this makeup. 1. Applied by sponge to my face. Went on easy until it dried. After it dried it seem to stick to every pore in my face. When I say dry, my look (Face)was Chalky. 2. Decided to apply with Brush. After foundation dried ,it just stuck on my face and did not feel natural. 3. After the first two times, I thought, let’s put this on lightly. So I did, and my face was blotchy in some areas (the foundation). So I returned the product. So I’ve learned not to believe all of the hype of the IL MAKIAGE products and the videos of people who say they use this and look so glamorous after using it.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on August 25, 2024

reviews.reviewText: The coverage is pretty decent. It is buildable. However, it has an odd scent. It's not overpowering but it is a little off putting. Also the liquid is thin & watery. Different than other brands I've tried. I don't see me buying this again.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 16, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I'm 50 y'all, this is Magic makeup 💋 Get it omg worth it 🤩
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 19, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I thought I had the perfect makeup until I tried this. Put a little on a brush and brush it on. I had to use my finger on the sides of my nose because I have big pores but other than that, the brush blended it all perfectly. It covers dark spots, freckles and blemishes. A++++
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 15, 2026
